hero.badge: First of its kind in the Middle East
hero.title: Your Vision,
hero.subtitle: A national digital platform empowering visually impaired individuals with access to services, guidance, and human connection — anytime, anywhere.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: 12 core digital services — accessible 24/7 in Arabic and English

video.title: Real-Time Video Assistance
video.desc: Connect with a trained volunteer via video call in under 60 seconds

docs.title: Document Reading
docs.desc: Volunteers read letters, forms, contracts and menus clearly and accurately

nav.title: Navigation & Orientation
nav.desc: Live video guidance while navigating streets, buildings and transit

medical.title: Medical Information
medical.desc: Prescriptions and dosage instructions read accurately and clearly

edu.title: Educational Resources
edu.desc: Audio and Braille library plus study support for all ages

legal.title: Legal Rights Guidance
legal.desc: Plain-language explanation of disability rights and legal procedures

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.desc: Instant distress button that alerts your pre-set emergency contact

volunteer.title: Volunteer Portal
volunteer.desc: Smart algorithm matches you with the best-rated specialist volunteer

events.title: Community Calendar
events.desc: Events, support sessions and activities for the blind community

jobs.title: Employment Board
jobs.desc: Job opportunities and vocational training suited for the visually impaired

braille.title: Braille & Audio Learning
braille.desc: Interactive lessons for Braille and screen-reader skills

gov.title: Government Services
gov.desc: Direct access to Metrash2, Hukoomi, and the National Human Rights Committee

app.title: بصير App
app.subtitle: First of its kind in the Middle East
app.desc: A revolutionary mobile app connecting visually impaired individuals with live human volunteers for real-time video guidance — wherever they are, whenever they need it.

privacy.title: Privacy & Protection
privacy.subtitle: Your safety is our absolute priority

items.title: End-to-End Encryption
items.desc: E2E encryption for all video and audio sessions. Content is deleted immediately after the session ends.

items.title: Verified Volunteers
items.desc: All volunteers are verified, trained, and rated after every session.

items.title: Panic Button
items.desc: Instantly end the session and alert your pre-designated emergency contact.

items.title: Legal Compliance
items.desc: Compliant with international personal data protection laws and ISO/IEC 27001.

vision.title: Why بصير?
vision.subtitle: National Vision 2030 demands inclusive digital services — بصير delivers them

items.title: Vision 2030
items.desc: Aligned with the human development pillar of National Vision 2030.

items.title: World Cup Legacy
items.desc: Pioneering inclusive digital infrastructure — بصير leads the way.

items.title: Arab Leadership
items.desc: The first unified digital platform for the blind in the Arab world.

items.title: UN Convention
items.desc: Fully aligned with the UN Convention on Rights of Persons with Disabilities (CRPD).

cta.title: Join the Ecosystem
cta.subtitle: Whether you need help or want to give it — بصير is your platform

contact.gov: Ministry of Social Development and Family

volunteer.title: Volunteer with بصير
volunteer.subtitle: Help a blind individual and add a human dimension to your life

steps.title: Register & Train
steps.desc: Sign up as a volunteer and complete the free online training in under 2 hours.

steps.title: Set Availability
steps.desc: Toggle your availability in the app and receive requests during your free time.

steps.title: Accept Request
steps.desc: Receive a help request notification and accept within 15 seconds.

steps.title: Provide Help
steps.desc: Start the video call and guide the user based on their needs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.name: Full Name
contact.address: Ministry of Social Development and Family, Doha
